summary: Phase A Stripe Subscription Tiers testing completed successfully. All 15 backend tests passed (13 + 2 skipped due to rate limiting). All frontend features verified: Pricing page shows 3 plans with correct prices ($0, $29, $99), 'Most Popular' badge on Professional, 'Current Plan' disabled button on free tier when logged in, Subscription page shows current plan/usage/features with Upgrade button, Dashboard has Plan button, Stripe checkout redirects correctly, mobile responsive at 375px.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Plans defined in-memory in subscription_routes.py with clear structure
Good: All subscription endpoints properly use authentication via Depends(get_current_user)
Good: Usage tracking counts from actual MongoDB documents (notarization_requests, ai_analyses, transactions)
Good: Stripe checkout integration uses emergentintegrations library correctly
Good: Frontend properly fetches current plan when authenticated to show 'Current Plan' button
Good: Usage bars show limit reached indicator with 'Upgrade' link when exceeded
Good: SubscriptionSuccess page polls checkout status with retry logic (8 max attempts)
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Pricing page is responsive at 375px mobile with stacked cards

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/17 passed, 2 skipped due to rate limiting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Stripe Subscription Tiers fully tested. 1) GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns 3 plans (free, pro, enterprise) with prices and features. 2) GET /api/subscriptions/current returns current plan, subscription status, and usage data. 3) GET /api/subscriptions/usage returns usage for notarizations, ai_analyses, transactions. 4) POST /api/subscriptions/checkout creates Stripe checkout session and redirects to checkout.stripe.com. 5) Cancel endpoint returns 400 for users without active paid subscription. 6) Pricing page (/pricing) shows 3 plan cards with 'Most Popular' on Professional. 7) Dashboard has Plan button linking to /subscription. 8) Subscription page shows current plan, usage bars with limits (3/5/1 for free), and Upgrade button. 9) All pages mobile responsive at 375px.

backend_subscription_plans.GET /api/subscriptions/plans: WORKING - Returns 3 plans: free ($0), pro ($29), enterprise ($99)
backend_subscription_plans.plan_features: WORKING - Each plan has features array and limits object
backend_subscription_plans.plan_limits_free: 3 notarizations, 5 AI analyses, 1 transaction per month

backend_current_subscription.GET /api/subscriptions/current: WORKING - Returns plan, subscription, and usage
backend_current_subscription.usage_tracking: WORKING - Counts from MongoDB for current month

backend_usage_endpoint.GET /api/subscriptions/usage: WORKING - Returns detailed usage per resource

backend_checkout.POST /api/subscriptions/checkout (free): BLOCKED - Returns 400 (free plan doesn't need payment)
backend_checkout.stripe_redirect: WORKING - Redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct amount

backend_cancel.POST /api/subscriptions/cancel: WORKING - Returns 400 when no active paid subscription

frontend_pricing_page.current_plan_button: WORKING - Disabled on free tier when logged in
frontend_pricing_page.subscribe_buttons: WORKING - Clickable on Pro and Enterprise

frontend_subscription_page.current_plan_card: WORKING - Shows plan name, price, status
frontend_subscription_page.usage_card: WORKING - Shows notarizations, AI analyses, transactions with progress bars
frontend_subscription_page.upgrade_button: WORKING - Shows for free plan users
frontend_subscription_page.limit_reached_indicator: WORKING - Shows when usage exceeds limit

stripe_integration.note: Stripe test key (sk_test_emergent) is configured. Actual payment completion not tested as expected in test mode.
